'''pavate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:swinishly|swinishly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-v-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:swinishly|swinishly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| pavate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:pavate|pavate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:pavatesher|pavatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pavatesherĂ«m|pavatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pavatero|pavatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:pavateshĂ«|pavateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pavateshĂ«m|pavateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipavatero|gokipavatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokipavateshĂ«|gokipavateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipavateshĂ«m|gokipavateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gopavankerom|gopavankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopavankeshĂ«|gopavankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopavankeshĂ«m|gopavankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gopavankeya|gopavankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pavaterom|pavaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pavatemu|pavatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:pavateya|pavateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipavaterom|gokipavaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipavatemu|gokipavatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokipavateya|gokipavateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:pavavate|pavavate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:pavavatesher|pavavatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pavavatesherĂ«m|pavavatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pavavatero|pavavatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:pavavateshĂ«|pavavateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pavavateshĂ«m|pavavateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipavavatero|gokipavavatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokipavavateshĂ«|gokipavavateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipavavateshĂ«m|gokipavavateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gopavavankerom|gopavavankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopavavankeshĂ«|gopavavankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopavavankeshĂ«m|gopavavankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gopavavankeya|gopavavankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pavavaterom|pavavaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pavavatemu|pavavatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:pavavateya|pavavateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipavavaterom|gokipavavaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipavavatemu|gokipavavatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokipavavateya|gokipavavateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:pĂŠvĂŠte|pĂŠvĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:pĂŠvĂŠtesher|pĂŠvĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pĂŠvĂŠtesherĂ«m|pĂŠvĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pĂŠvĂŠtero|pĂŠvĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:pĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«|pĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«m|pĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipĂŠvĂŠtero|gokipĂŠvĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokipĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«|gokipĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«m|gokipĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gopĂŠvĂŠnkerom|gopĂŠvĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopĂŠvĂŠnkeshĂ«|gopĂŠvĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopĂŠvĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gopĂŠvĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gopĂŠvĂŠnkeya|gopĂŠvĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pĂŠvĂŠterom|pĂŠvĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pĂŠvĂŠtemu|pĂŠvĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:pĂŠvĂŠteya|pĂŠvĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipĂŠvĂŠterom|gokipĂŠvĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipĂŠvĂŠtemu|gokipĂŠvĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokipĂŠvĂŠteya|gokipĂŠvĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:pafvafte|pafvafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:pafvaftesher|pafvaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pafvaftesherĂ«m|pafvaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pafvaftero|pafvaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:pafvafteshĂ«|pafvafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pafvafteshĂ«m|pafvafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipafvaftero|gokipafvaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokipafvafteshĂ«|gokipafvafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipafvafteshĂ«m|gokipafvafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gopafvafnkerom|gopafvafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopafvafnkeshĂ«|gopafvafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopafvafnkeshĂ«m|gopafvafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gopafvafnkeya|gopafvafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pafvafterom|pafvafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pafvaftemu|pafvaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:pafvafteya|pafvafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipafvafterom|gokipafvafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipafvaftemu|gokipafvaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokipafvafteya|gokipafvafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
